metadata.description: CrowdStrike Next-Gen SIEM CQL Rules for ATT&CK Coverage Gaps
metadata.author: TachTech Labs

rules.name: T1007 - System Service Discovery
rules.objective: Detect enumeration of system services using native tools
rules.query:
#event_simpleName=ProcessRollup2
| ImageFileName=/(sc|net|wmic|powershell)\.exe$/i
| CommandLine=/(sc\s+query|Get-Service|wmic\s+service|net\s+start)/i
| groupBy([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName], function=[
    count(as=ExecCount),
    collect([CommandLine], limit=10),
    min(@timestamp, as=FirstSeen),
    max(@timestamp, as=LastSeen)
  ])
| sort(ExecCount, order=desc)
| table([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName, CommandLine, ExecCount, FirstSeen, LastSeen])
| head(100)

rules.name: T1010 - Application Window Discovery
rules.objective: Detect enumeration of open application windows
rules.query:
#event_simpleName=ProcessRollup2
| ImageFileName=/(powershell|tasklist)\.exe$/i
| CommandLine=/(Get-Process.*MainWindowTitle|tasklist\s+\/v)/i
| groupBy([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName], function=[
    count(as=ExecCount),
    collect([CommandLine], limit=10),
    min(@timestamp, as=FirstSeen),
    max(@timestamp, as=LastSeen)
  ])
| sort(ExecCount, order=desc)
| table([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName, CommandLine, ExecCount, FirstSeen, LastSeen])
| head(100)

rules.name: T1012 - Query Registry
rules.objective: Detect suspicious registry queries for system information
rules.query:
#event_simpleName=ProcessRollup2
| ImageFileName=/(reg|powershell)\.exe$/i
| CommandLine=/(reg\s+query|Get-ItemProperty.*HKLM|Get-ItemProperty.*HKCU)/i
| CommandLine!=/(Google|Microsoft|Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run)/i
| groupBy([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName], function=[
    count(as=QueryCount),
    collect([CommandLine], limit=15),
    min(@timestamp, as=FirstSeen),
    max(@timestamp, as=LastSeen)
  ])
| QueryCount > 5
| sort(QueryCount, order=desc)
| table([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName, CommandLine, QueryCount, FirstSeen, LastSeen])
| head(100)

rules.name: T1016 - System Network Configuration Discovery
rules.objective: Detect network configuration enumeration
rules.query:
#event_simpleName=ProcessRollup2
| ImageFileName=/(ipconfig|netsh|route|arp|powershell)\.exe$/i
| CommandLine=/(ipconfig|netsh\s+interface|route\s+print|arp\s+-a|Get-NetIPConfiguration|Get-NetAdapter)/i
| groupBy([ComputerName, UserName], function=[
    count(as=EnumCount),
    count(ImageFileName, distinct=true, as=UniqueTools),
    collect([ImageFileName, CommandLine], limit=15),
    min(@timestamp, as=FirstSeen),
    max(@timestamp, as=LastSeen)
  ])
| UniqueTools > 2
| sort(EnumCount, order=desc)
| table([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName, CommandLine, EnumCount, UniqueTools, FirstSeen, LastSeen])
| head(100)

| CommandLine=/(hostname|whoami|systeminfo|Get-WmiObject.*Win32_ComputerSystem)/i
| ParentBaseFileName!=/(explorer|services|svchost)\.exe$/i
| groupBy([ComputerName, UserName, ParentBaseFileName, ImageFileName], function=[
    count(as=CheckCount),
    collect([CommandLine], limit=10),
    min(@timestamp, as=FirstSeen),
    max(@timestamp, as=LastSeen)
  ])
| CheckCount > 3
| sort(CheckCount, order=desc)
| table([ComputerName, UserName, ParentBaseFileName, ImageFileName, CommandLine, CheckCount, FirstSeen, LastSeen])

rules.objective: Detect deployment of potentially malicious containers
rules.query:
#event_simpleName=ProcessRollup2
| CommandLine=/(docker\s+run|kubectl\s+run|podman\s+run)/i
| CommandLine=/(--privileged|hostPID|hostNetwork|--cap-add)/i
| groupBy([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName], function=[
    count(as=DeployCount),
    collect([CommandLine], limit=15),
    min(@timestamp, as=FirstSeen),
    max(@timestamp, as=LastSeen)
  ])
| sort(DeployCount, order=desc)
| table([ComputerName, UserName, ImageFileName, CommandLine, DeployCount, FirstSeen, LastSeen])
| head(100)
